rationale: Builds on the current soft quant-aware projection ramp instead of resetting course. The new change only refines final int8 quantization for projection weights: when a tensor already qualifies for row-offset quantization, attn/MLP projection matrices now test a min-max midpoint offset against the existing row-mean offset and keep whichever reconstructs better. That targets the same projection-heavy part of the model the best run already emphasized, while avoiding the broader per-row multi-center and axis-mix changes that already regressed. I also removed the now-unnecessary quant_aware_lr_muls helper by inlining it to keep the script lean under the 1500-line limit.
title: Selective Projection Midpoint Int8
